MAJOR PROJECT

IOT based voice Automated Smart Wearable for women's safety

BY : Kanchi Roopchand Sai

Duration : 6 Months

Role : Team member

This IOT project mainly focuses on Live video streaming of incident along with GPS co-ordinates to police authorities. (web server to client access based on IP address). Heart pulse and body temperature sensing with speech recognition assistant and OLED interface
